# Resource (hush_temporal_cloud_access_privilege)

Manage Temporal Cloud access privileges in the Hush Security platform.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Create a Temporal Cloud access privilege
resource "hush_temporal_cloud_access_privilege" "example" {
  name        = "prod-namespace-read"
  description = "Read access to production namespaces"

  grants {
    namespace  = "prod.acct1"
    permission = "read"
  }

  grants {
    namespace  = "staging.acct1"
    permission = "write"
  }
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `grants` (Block List, Min: 1) The list of namespace permission grants (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--grants))
- `name` (String) The name of the Temporal Cloud access privilege

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the Temporal Cloud access privilege

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the Temporal Cloud access privilege
- `type` (String) The type of access privilege

<a id="nestedblock--grants"></a>
### Nested Schema for `grants`

Required:

- `namespace` (String) The Temporal Cloud namespace
- `permission` (String) The permission level (read, write, or admin)
